tasks.notes: Created src/, src/activities/, src/models/, src/utils/, commands/, templates/, ci/, tests/ with __init__.py files. Created pyproject.toml. Ported logger.py, url_sanitizer.py, markdown_formatter.py to src/utils/. Verified: python -c 'import src' passes.

Ported review_models.py with all legacy models + new Finding, FixVerification, FindingsFile dataclasses. Created config.py stripping all OpenAI fields, keeping ADO auth + penalty matrix + star thresholds, added VCS (ado/github) and GH_TOKEN fields. Verified imports with PYTHONPATH=src.

Ported all 8 activities to src/activities/ with updated imports. Added cr-id extraction (_extract_cr_id) to FetchPRCommentsActivity and cr-id injection (<!-- cr-id: {cr_id} -->) to PostPRCommentActivity._post_line_comment. Updated UpdateSummaryActivity summary markers to use new SUMMARY_MARKER. All 8 activities import without errors.

Ported pr_scorer.py to src/pr_scorer.py, adapted calculate_pr_score to accept List[Finding]. Added apply_mode_multipliers: security/performance x2 (warning->critical), architecture x1.5 (suggestion->warning), migration elevates all to critical. Ported score_comparison.py to src/score_comparison.py, adapted to work with both new FixVerification[] and legacy FixVerificationResult. All verified.

pytest: no tests yet (0 collected, exit 5 — expected at Phase 1 stage). All imports resolve with PYTHONPATH=src. Config strips OpenAI, VCS+GH_TOKEN present. cr-id extraction and injection verified. Mode multipliers verified (security/performance warning->critical, migration all->critical). Pushed to origin.

Created src/vcs.py with argparse CLI and 6 subcommands: get-pr, list-threads, post-comment, resolve-thread, get-file, post-summary. All wrap corresponding activities. JSON to stdout, errors to stderr. Auth from env via Settings.

Created commands/findings-schema.json (JSON Schema draft-07 matching FindingsFile). Created src/post_findings.py (~380 lines): validates schema, filters <0.7 confidence, caps 30/5-per-file by severity, fetches existing cr-ids, deduplicates, scores with mode multipliers, posts comments (ADO activity, GitHub gh api), handles fix_verifications, reads .codereview.yml gate thresholds, posts summary, outputs structured JSON. --dry-run skips VCS writes. Logging redirected to stderr for clean JSON stdout.

Created tests/conftest.py (shared fixtures), tests/test_pr_scorer.py (18 tests: 0 findings=5 stars, security critical=5.0, mode multipliers), tests/test_post_findings.py (24 tests: confidence filter, cap, cr-id dedup, .codereview.yml thresholds, dry-run E2E), tests/test_vcs_cli.py (24 tests: subcommand parsing, activity invocation). All 66 tests passing.

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 2 — VCS CLI + Post Findings
tasks.notes: pytest: 66 passed, 0 failed. vcs.py --help: all 6 subcommands shown. post_findings.py --dry-run with tests/fixtures/sample_findings.json: valid JSON output, confidence filter drops cr-006 (0.60), security mode elevates cr-002 warning→critical, gate fails as expected. Pushed to origin.

Created commands/review-pr-core.md (~200 lines): all 7 steps (load context, fetch PR data with VCS-conditional ADO/GitHub blocks, detect review mode, assess T1-T5 scale, review each file with intent markers/grep/blame, fix verification on re-push, write findings.json). Verbatim constraints present: max 30 findings, max 5 per file, max 40 tool calls, confidence 0.0-1.0. References commands/findings-schema.json by path. VCS-conditional blocks in Steps 2, 5, and 6. Created commands/scoring.md: full penalty matrix (all 5 categories x 3 severities), star rating thresholds, mode multipliers, confidence expectations.

Created Dockerfile: node:22-slim base, installs python3/venv/pip/git/curl/jq/ripgrep/gh CLI via apt, npm installs @openai/codex + repomix, python venv at /opt/venv with project deps, copies src/commands/templates/AGENTS.md/entrypoint.sh, sets PYTHONPATH=/app/src, workdir /workspace. Created entrypoint.sh: validates PR_ID/REPO/VCS/AGENT env vars, mkdir .cr, Phase 1 dispatch (codex/claude/gemini via $AGENT with --sandbox=none for codex), verifies findings.json produced and valid JSON, Phase 2 runs post_findings.py. Created docker-compose.yml for local dev with env var passthrough and volume mounts.

Created AGENTS.md (Codex project instructions): two-phase architecture explanation, primary directive to read commands/review-pr-core.md, tool list, output location, hard constraints, env var table. Created PROJECT-CLAUDE.md (identical content adapted for Claude). Fixed Dockerfile: removed invalid COPY shell redirect, restructured to install Python deps directly (azure-devops/pydantic/pydantic-settings/msrest/jsonschema) then copy source. Smoke test: pytest 66/66 passed. post_findings.py --dry-run with tests/fixtures/sample_findings.json produces valid JSON: 5 findings (cr-006 filtered at 0.65 confidence), score 12.5 penalty=3 stars, gate fails on 2 criticals as expected. Docker hard gate: Docker Desktop not running in this environment — noted as BLOCKER for Task 13.

pytest: 66 passed, 0 failed. Dry-run: post_findings.py --dry-run with sample_findings.json produces valid JSON (cr-006 filtered, 5 findings posted, security mode elevates cr-002 warning->critical, gate fails as expected). Dockerfile: 53 lines, no invalid syntax, FROM node:22-slim. BLOCKER: Docker Desktop not running in this environment — docker build could not be executed. Image size unknown. Dockerfile has been validated structurally. Docker build must be verified manually or in CI. Pushed to origin.

Created commands/review-mode-standard.md (correctness, patterns, test coverage, naming, error handling, edge cases), review-mode-security.md (OWASP Top 10: injection, auth bypass, secrets, crypto, insecure defaults, CVEs — warning→critical multiplier), review-mode-migration.md (data loss, rollback safety, lock duration, idempotency, zero-downtime — all→critical), review-mode-docs-chore.md (doc accuracy, changelog, config correctness, formatting — light-touch, max 10 findings).

Mode auto-detection for all 6 modes (migration, security, architecture, performance, docs_chore, standard) already present in review-pr-core.md Step 3 from Task 10. post_findings.py already reads review_modes from findings.json and passes to apply_mode_multipliers (verified in Phase 2). Created templates/.codereview.md (starter conventions with inline comments), templates/.codereview.yml (min_star_rating:3, fail_on_critical:true, commented optional fields), templates/dismissed.jsonl (empty). Also fix: entrypoint.sh now copies PROJECT-CLAUDE.md into /workspace when AGENT=claude (MEDIUM finding from Phase 3 review).

All three intent markers already documented in review-pr-core.md Step 5b from Task 10: # cr: intentional (skip line), # cr: ignore-next-line (skip next line), # cr: ignore-block start/end (skip block). Instructions state: 'If a potential finding falls within a marked region, do not include it in findings.json.' No changes needed.

pytest: 66 passed, 0 failed. Mode files: all 4 exist (standard, security, migration, docs-chore). Templates: .codereview.md, .codereview.yml, dismissed.jsonl all present in templates/. Intent markers: all 3 types documented in Step 5b of review-pr-core.md. entrypoint.sh: PROJECT-CLAUDE.md copy added for AGENT=claude. Pushed to origin.
